name: Line Chart
implementation_notes: Use for showing trends use markers for data points
accessibility_notes: Include data table alternative describable patterns

name: Area Chart
implementation_notes: Fill area shows magnitude good for stacked data
accessibility_notes: Provide patterns or textures for colorblind users

name: Bar Chart
implementation_notes: Horizontal for long labels vertical for time

name: Column Chart
implementation_notes: Similar to bar but vertical orientation
accessibility_notes: Add labels on bars for accessibility

name: Pie Chart
implementation_notes: Max 5-7 slices use donut for modern look

name: Donut Chart
implementation_notes: Center can show total or key metric

name: Radar Chart
implementation_notes: Good for comparing profiles or skills

name: Sankey Diagram
implementation_notes: Show flow of resources or traffic

name: Waterfall Chart
implementation_notes: Show how values add up or decrease

name: Polar Area
implementation_notes: Similar to pie with equal angles
